name: forklift-robot-gui
description: Root developer tooling for the Forklift Robot GUI project.

scripts.help:
node -e 'console.log(`Kullanilabilir komutlar:

  npm run dev:fake
    Frontend + GUI Backend acilir. Robot backend gerekmez; GUI Backend fake client ile calisir.
    Hizli UI gelistirme ve dashboard testi icin kullanilir. Digital Twin Demo Mode gercekci sekilde burada calismayabilir; asil demo icin dev:mock kullanilmalidir.

  npm run dev:mock
    Mock Robot Backend :9000, GUI Backend :8000 ve Frontend :5173 acilir.
    GUI Backend ROBOT_CLIENT_MODE=real ve ROBOT_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:9000 ile calisir.
    Entegrasyon testi ve Digital Twin Demo Mode icin onerilir. Demo sekmesindeki "Demo Gorevini Baslat" burada kullanilmalidir.

  npm run frontend:dev
    Sadece React frontend dev server acilir.

  npm run backend:fake
    Sadece GUI Backend fake mode ile :8000 portunda acilir.

  npm run mock:backend
    Sadece Mock Robot Backend :9000 portunda acilir.

  npm run backend:mock
    Sadece GUI Backend real mode ile mock backend baglantisiyla :8000 portunda acilir.

  npm run build
    Frontend production build calisir; backend icin python compileall ve ana modul import kontrolu yapilir.

  npm run check
    Demo oncesi hizli dogrulama komutu; su an build ile ayni kontrolleri calistirir.

dev:fake vs dev:mock:
  dev:fake robot backend olmadan hizli UI/fake data testi icindir.
  dev:mock mock backend + GUI backend + frontend zincirini calistirir ve Digital Twin Demo Mode icin onerilen komuttur.`)'
scripts.dev:fake: concurrently -n frontend,gui-backend -c blue,green "npm run frontend:dev" "npm run backend:fake"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n mock-backend,gui-backend,frontend -c magenta,green,blue "npm run mock:backend" "npm run backend:mock" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.backend:mock: cd backend && ROBOT_CLIENT_MODE=real ROBOT_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:9000 ../venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && cd backend && ../venv/bin/python -m compileall -q app mock_robot_backend && ../venv/bin/python -c "import app.main; import mock_robot_backend.main"
